name: before-its-gone
description: Before It's Gone: cross-platform food expiry tracker for Linux, macOS, and Windows

scripts.dev:electron: concurrently -k "npm run dev:web" "wait-on tcp:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 ELECTRON_OZONE_PLATFORM_HINT=auto npm --workspace apps/electron run dev"
scripts.build:web: npm run build:packages && npm --workspace apps/web run build
scripts.build:electron: npm run build:packages && npm run build:web && npm --workspace apps/electron run build
scripts.package:linux: npm run build:electron && npm --workspace apps/electron run package:linux
scripts.package:linux:arm64: npm run build:electron && npm --workspace apps/electron run package:linux:arm64
scripts.package:macos: npm run build:electron && npm --workspace apps/electron run package:macos
scripts.package:windows: npm run build:electron && npm --workspace apps/electron run package:windows
scripts.package:appimage: npm run build:electron && npm --workspace apps/electron run package:appimage
scripts.checksum:linux: node -e "const{createHash}=require('crypto'),fs=require('fs'),p=require('path'),dir='release';if(!fs.existsSync(dir)){console.error('release/ not found');process.exit(0);}const files=fs.readdirSync(dir).filter(f=>['.AppImage','.deb','.rpm'].some(e=>f.endsWith(e)));if(!files.length){console.log('No Linux artifacts found in release/.');process.exit(0);}files.forEach(f=>{const h=createHash('sha256').update(fs.readFileSync(p.join(dir,f))).digest('hex');console.log(h+'  '+f);});"
scripts.checksum:windows: node -e "const{createHash}=require('crypto'),fs=require('fs'),p=require('path'),dir='release';if(!fs.existsSync(dir)){console.error('release/ not found');process.exit(0);}const files=fs.readdirSync(dir).filter(f=>f.endsWith('.exe'));if(!files.length){console.log('No Windows artifacts found in release/.');process.exit(0);}files.forEach(f=>{const h=createHash('sha256').update(fs.readFileSync(p.join(dir,f))).digest('hex');console.log(h+'  '+f);});"
